title: Fake AI satellite imagery spurs US-Iran war disinformation
description: The satellite image posted by an Iranian news outlet looked real: a devastated US base in Qatar.

title: Samsung prepares Meta Ray-Ban rival AI glasses for 2026: What to expect
description: Samsung has revealed early details of its upcoming AI smart glasses, including an eye-level camera and smartphone connectivity, ahead of a planned launch in 2026

title: AI trends to watch in 2026: What you need to know

title: Boost Focus On AI, Automation In Education: PM Modi
description: New Delhi, Mar 9: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Monday called for accelerating the integration of India’s education sector with the real-world economy, stressing the need to expand focus on emerging fields such as artificial intelligence and automation. Addressing a post-budget webinar, the Prime Minister said the country must further strengthen the linkage between education [...]The post Boost Focus On AI, Automation In Education: PM Modi appeared first on Northlines.

title: The future of generative AI in software testing
description: Cloud is for everyone, but not every single thing. This much we know.
